frozen_components: symbolic encoding of object affordances and habitats
architecture.summary: A neurosymbolic platform (VoxWorld) that grounds linguistic information in multimodal simulations of interactive situations and events. The system combines symbolic encoding of object affordances and habitats with neural embedding vectors, enabling transfer of knowledge to novel entities and learning of linguistic/gestural denotations. Information flows from symbolic situational representations (affordances, habitats, events) into neural embeddings that capture task-appropriate semantic structure.
trained_components: neural embedding vectors of symbolically-encoded affordances
models for linguistic and gestural denotation recognition and generation

biblio.title: Affordance embeddings for situated language understanding

claims.statement: Large neural language models demonstrate apparently sophisticated linguistic understanding or generation capabilities, but often fail to transfer their skills to situations they have not encountered before

Computational situated grounding of linguistic information to real or simulated scenarios provides a solution to learning challenges by creating situational representations that serve as a formal model of salient phenomena and contain rich, task-appropriate data for training flexible computational models
Neural embedding vectors of symbolically-encoded object affordances facilitate transferring knowledge of objects and situations to novel entities

The VoxWorld platform demonstrates learning to recognize and generate linguistic and gestural denotations through multimodal contextual modeling of interactive situations, events, and object properties
